headline: Jacobs introduces Flood IQ to help utilities and cities anticipate and manage flood risk
summary: DALLAS, April 21, 2026--Jacobs' Flood IQ solution integrates data, rapid forecasting and operations intelligence to support faster, more informed decisions.
